creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for your feedback.

In your vision, how the LICENSE_PERMS should be configured here in FreeBSD?

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/licenses.html
5.7.2


 LICENSE=       TundraWare
 LICENSE_NAME=  TundraWare license
 LICENSE_FILE=  ${WRKSRC}/tdir-license.txt
 LICENSE_PERMS= dist-mirror no-dist-sell no-pkg-mirror no-pkg-sell no-auto-accept


Just a reminder, if the shebang is changed, 'tdir' package will be distributed with this modification.

Regards.
